checks.description: Verify that Q returns to zero after reset deassertion even if reset is asserted mid-cycle.
checks.pass_condition: After reset is deasserted, Q must be observed as zero within a conservative observation window without assuming exact-cycle latency.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is deasserted following an active-low assertion.

checks.description: Observe Johnson counter progression over multiple clock cycles after reset release.
checks.pass_condition: Q should exhibit the Johnson sequence pattern over the observed cycles, allowing any number of cycles per transition as long as the pattern is eventually observed.
checks.trigger_condition: When the counter is allowed to run after reset release.
